children.heading: .—Court Authority
children.label: b .—Court Authority
children.text: Unless the court for cause orders otherwise, paragraphs (1), (2), and (4) of section 1102(a) and sections 1102(b), 1103, and 1125 of this title do not apply in a case under this subchapter.

children.heading: .—Special Rule for Discharge
children.label: c .—Special Rule for Discharge
children.text: If a plan is confirmed under , shall not apply, except as provided in .section 1191(b) of this titlesection 1141(d) of this titlesection 1192 of this title
